What's inside

Write faster. Think
more clearly.

Every feature in NOVE is designed around one idea — getting out of your way so your best thinking can happen.

Android & Windows
A distraction-free editor that keeps up with you
Markdown shortcuts, bold/italic, image embedding, inline code, and hashtag-based tagging — all in a clean layout. Hit Cmd/Ctrl+K for the command palette to search notes or jump to any view instantly.
Cmd+K Palette PDF Export Image Embed #Hashtag Tags Live Word Count
Android & Windows
A visual board for thinking out loud
Pin colourful sticky notes to a brainstorming canvas. On desktop, pop them out as floating windows or minimize to a dot while you write.
Android Only
Your private notes stay private
Fingerprint or face unlock protects your notes at the OS level. No PIN, no password — just your biometrics.
🔒Touch to Unlock
Android Only
Launch any app from your sticky board
Attach a deep link to any sticky note — tap it to open Spotify, Maps, YouTube, or any installed app instantly.
▶
YouTube
→
♪

Android & Windows
Build a writing habit worth keeping
NOVE tracks your consecutive writing days and celebrates each milestone. One note a day is all it takes.
🔥
14
Day Streak
Keep going
Best: 31 days
Android Only
Internet connection required
The Android app connects to the internet for syncing, loading media, and delivering reminders. A stable connection is recommended for the best experience.
ℹ️ Note: NOVE for Android requires an active internet connection. Windows desktop works fully offline.
Android & Windows
Find any note in under a second
Filter by category, star favourites, archive old notes, and search by keyword or #hashtag.
Work Ideas Personal Urgent
Android & Windows
Nothing is ever permanently lost
Archive notes you don't need daily. Deleted something by mistake? Recover it instantly from Trash before it's gone for good.
Android Only
Never forget a note that matters
Set a timed reminder on any note. NOVE will notify you exactly when you need it — no separate calendar app required.

Getting started

Writing with NOVE takes
under a minute to set up.

1

Download

Grab the APK for Android or the Windows installer from this page. No store, no account needed.

2

Write Your First Note

Tap "+ New Note" and start writing. Everything saves instantly. Android requires an internet connection.

3

Organise as You Go

Tag with #hashtags, pick a category, star what matters, and drop quick ideas on the Sticky Board.

4

Export & Share

Hit PUBLISH to generate a polished PDF. Share notes as text or screenshot a formatted view anywhere.

What's Coming

The best version of NOVE
is still being built.

NOVE is actively developed. Here's a look at what's in the pipeline — community feedback shapes what ships next.

🔄

Cross-Platform Sync — Android ↔ Windows

Coming Soon

Write a note on your phone, open it instantly on your desktop — and vice versa. Real-time, seamless, and always in sync. This is the most-requested feature and it's actively being built.

Live two-way sync Android + Windows No manual export

Cloud Backup
Your notes, safely backed up to the cloud. Always opt-in — your data never leaves your device unless you choose.

Desktop ↔ Mobile Handoff
Pick up exactly where you left off — cursor position, scroll state, and open note. Seamlessly, between any device.

🍎
iOS & macOS
NOVE for Apple devices. Android and Windows first — iOS and macOS are next on the roadmap.

Collaborative Notes
Share a note with someone and work on it together in real time. Great for teams, writing partners, and joint projects.
Planned
🎨
Custom Themes
Full control over your workspace colours and typography. Choose from curated presets or build your own palette.
Planned
📊
Writing Analytics
Detailed stats on your writing habits — words written per day, session length, streak history, and peak writing times.

Common Questions

Answered honestly.

Is NOVE really free — no catch?+
Yes. Every feature — rich editor, sticky board, biometric lock, app linking, streak tracker, reminders, PDF export — is included at no cost. No subscription tier, no feature lock, no advertising. It's free because we believe good tools should be accessible.
Does the Android app require internet?+
Yes — the Android version of NOVE requires an active internet connection to function properly. This enables features like sync (coming soon), media loading, and reminders. The Windows desktop app, however, works fully offline with all notes stored locally on your machine.
Why isn't it on the Play Store?+
NOVE is distributed directly from this website as an APK file. This removes platform fees, approval delays, and algorithm dependency — meaning faster updates and a genuinely free app with no store commission built into the pricing. It's the same way many trusted tools are distributed.
Is it safe to install an APK from a website?+
Yes, when it comes from the developer's own website. NOVE is built with Flutter — Google's trusted cross-platform framework — and is distributed exclusively from this page. You will need to enable "Install from Unknown Sources" in Android settings once, which is standard procedure for direct APK installs.
When is cross-platform sync coming?+
Sync between Android and Windows is our most-requested feature and is actively being developed. It will allow notes created on your phone to appear instantly on your desktop (and vice versa) in real time. When it arrives, sync will be opt-in — you'll never be forced to use cloud storage. No firm release date yet, but it's our top priority for the next major update.
Where is my data stored on Windows?+
On Windows, all notes are stored locally on your device. NOVE requires no internet connection on desktop and syncs nothing to any server. Cloud sync is planned as an optional future feature — it will always be opt-in, never mandatory.
What is App Linking in Sticky Notes?+
App Linking is an Android-exclusive feature. Tap the link icon on any sticky note to attach a deep link to an installed app — Spotify, YouTube, Google Maps, or anything else. The next time you tap that sticky, it opens the linked app directly. It turns your sticky board into a shortcut launcher for your workflow.
Which features are Android-only vs Windows-only?+
Android-exclusive: Biometric lock, App Linking in sticky notes, and note reminders. Windows-exclusive: Floating companion windows for stickies, the minimize-to-dot feature, and fully offline operation. Everything else — rich editor, sticky board, categories, streak tracker, archive, trash, and PDF export — is available on both platforms.
